summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected; open non-security PRs are kept independent for normal maintainer review or author follow-up. Security-sensitive hydrated refs are routed to central security handling without mutating GitHub.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked ref is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup.
Security-boundary PR must be handled by central OpenClaw security review, not cluster cleanup.
Distinct maintainer-owned session-state work with active review blockers; no close or merge action is allowed in this plan job.
Narrow documentation/descriptors PR should stay in the normal maintainer review queue.
Feature/API compatibility work needs proof and review; not a duplicate, low-signal close, or merge candidate for this plan.
Doc-only SafeOps wording PR has its own review path and author follow-up; no close action is justified.
Non-security hardening/config PR remains independent and blocked on review/proof, not dedupe cleanup.
Narrow LINE credential contract fix should stay independent for maintainer review.
Focused approval-flow PR is independent and merge is blocked by job frontmatter.
Closed security-sensitive candidate remains out of Clownfish mutation scope; no further close action is valid.
Small terminal refactor remains independent with author/review follow-up; not eligible for close or merge in this job.
